problem.title: Maximize Active Section With Trade I

approaches.title: Run-length analysis of binary sections
approaches.summary: Compresses or streams contiguous runs of equal bits, counts all existing active sections, and finds the maximum gain from combining neighboring zero runs around

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Builds an explicit run-length encoding, evaluates adjacent zero-run gains, and adds the total number of one bits.
Refactors the same run-based strategy to stream chunks with `chunk_by`, avoiding explicit compression storage.
